title: Code of Conduct
text: project follows rOpenSci Code Conduct. Report unacceptable behavior channels listed policy. include private researcher data, access tokens, local cookies, sensitive institutional details public issues pull requests.

title: Contributing to tezr
text: Thank considering contribution tezr. project follows rOpenSci Code Conduct. Please keep issues pull requests professional, reproducible, free sensitive data.

title: Contributing to tezr
text: Fork clone repository. Install development dependencies R.
code: git clone https://github.com/your-username/tezr.git cd tezr git checkout -b feature/your-feature-name install.packages("devtools") devtools::install_dev_deps()

title: Contributing to tezr
text: Write code existing package style. Add update roxygen documentation exported functions. Add focused tests new behavior. Run core local checks opening pull request. Use air format . Air available. repository also Air formatting check GitHub Actions.
code: devtools::document() devtools::test() devtools::check()

title: Contributing to tezr
text: default test suite uses fixtures mocks. contact National Thesis Center portal. Run default suite : Live integration tests skipped unless explicitly enable . Run live tests sparingly. depend portal availability, network behavior, current NTC markup. can also take longer package applies request delays.
code: devtools::test() TEZR_LIVE_TESTS=true Rscript -e 'devtools::test()'

title: Contributing to tezr
text: README vignette builds run live NTC queries default. Set TEZR_LIVE_EXAMPLES=true intentionally want documentation chunks contact portal. Save returned objects saveRDS() readr::write_rds() developing examples live data. Avoid repeated identical portal requests.
code: TEZR_LIVE_EXAMPLES=true Rscript -e 'devtools::build_readme()' TEZR_LIVE_EXAMPLES=true Rscript -e 'pkgdown::build_site()'

title: Contributing to tezr
text: tezr identifies package-specific user agent. Use request_config(user_agent = "...") institution portal requires different value. Use request_config(verbose = FALSE) TEZR_VERBOSE=false silence informational progress messages local development. Warnings errors still shown.

title: Contributing to tezr
text: useful bug report includes function call, small reproducible example, returned error warning, package version, R version, whether TEZR_LIVE_TESTS TEZR_LIVE_EXAMPLES enabled. post private researcher data, thesis full-text files, local cookies, session headers, access tokens, sensitive institutional details. Redact query terms reveal private research plans.

title: Analysis Examples
text: Let’s use search_advanced() search_field parameter set . result tibble matching records year, author, university, metadata.
code: # Search for "iklim değişikliği" (climate change) in thesis titles if (live_examples) {   climate <- search_advanced(keyword = "iklim değişikliği",                              search_field = "all",                              max_search_results = Inf) } else {   climate <- tezr_example_climate_results() } glimpse(climate) #> Rows: 24 #> Columns: 13 #> $ thesis_no         <chr> "9677551", "9759882", "9557793", "9749764",… #> $ title_original    <chr> "Iklim degisikligi 1", "Iklim degisikligi 2… #> $ title_translation <chr> "Climate change 1", "Climate change 2", "Cl… #> $ author            <chr> "PERIHAN EZGI BALLI", "CENAP ALAYBEYI", "SE… #> $ university        <chr> "Ankara Universitesi", "Istanbul Universite… #> $ year              <int> 2015, 2016, 2017, 2018, 2019, 2020, 2021, 2… #> $ thesis_type_tr    <chr> "Doktora", "Yuksek Lisans", "Yuksek Lisans"… #> $ thesis_type_en    <chr> "Master", "Doctorate", "Master", "Doctorate… #> $ language_tr       <chr> "Turkce", "Turkce", "Turkce", "Turkce", "Tu… #> $ language_en       <chr> "Turkish", "Turkish", "Turkish", "Turkish",… #> $ subject_tr        <chr> "Cevre Bilimleri; Ekonomi", "Cevre Bilimler… #> $ subject_en        <chr> "Environmental Sciences; Economics", "Envir… #> $ detail_id         <chr> "TCKf4ksTOVsOBqUcPYMKWQ", "LypZzbdoWcG0f3c6…

title: Analysis Examples
text: Let’s count theses per year smooth 10-year rolling average. rolling average reveals sustained growth versus one-spikes. can adjust k wider narrower window.
code: # Count theses per year yearly_counts <- climate |>   count(year) |>   arrange(year) |>   mutate(     year_numeric = as.numeric(year),     # 10-year rolling average to smooth yearly variation     rolling_avg = rolling_mean_right(n, k = 10)   )  # Bar chart with rolling average overlay yearly_counts |>   na.omit() |>   ggplot(aes(x = year_numeric)) +   geom_col(aes(y = n), fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.6) +   geom_line(aes(y = rolling_avg), color = "red", linewidth = 1) +   labs(     title = "Climate Change Research in Turkish Universities",     subtitle = "Annual thesis count with 10-year rolling average",     x = "Year",     y = "Number of Theses",     caption = "Red line: 10-year moving average"   ) +   theme_minimal(base_size = 11)

title: Analysis Examples
text: can split degree type see drives growth. Filter two main types readable plot.
code: # Compare master's and PhD thesis counts over time type_trends <- climate |>   filter(thesis_type_en %in% c("Master", "Doctorate")) |>   count(year, thesis_type_en) |>   mutate(year = as.numeric(year))  type_trends |>   ggplot(aes(x = year, y = n, color = thesis_type_en)) +   geom_line(linewidth = 1) +   labs(     title = "Climate Research by Degree Type",     x = "Year",     y = "Number of Theses",     color = "Degree"   ) +   theme_minimal(base_size = 11)

title: Analysis Examples
code: # All econometrics theses, counted by university if (live_examples) {   econ_theses <- search_detailed(subject = "Ekonometri",                                  max_search_results = Inf) } else {   econ_theses <- tezr_example_econ_theses() }  uni_counts <- econ_theses |>   count(university, sort = TRUE)  uni_counts |>   head(10) #> # A tibble: 4 × 2 #>   university                n #>   <chr>                 <int> #> 1 Ankara Universitesi       4 #> 2 Ege Universitesi          4 #> 3 Istanbul Universitesi     4 #> 4 Marmara Universitesi      4

title: Analysis Examples
text: Let’s create simple bar chart. Horizontal bars make long Turkish university names easy read.
code: uni_counts |>   head(10) |>   ggplot(aes(x = n, y = reorder(university, n))) +   geom_col() +   labs(     title = "Top 10 Universities for Econometrics Research",     subtitle = "Total thesis count (all years)",     x = "Number of Theses",     y = NULL   ) +   theme_minimal(base_size = 11)

title: Analysis Examples
text: Let’s compare top four universities 2000 onward.
code: top4_unis <- uni_counts$university[1:4]  # Filter to top 4 universities, 2000 onward uni_trends <- econ_theses |>   filter(university %in% top4_unis) |>   mutate(year = as.numeric(year)) |>   filter(year >= 2000) |>   count(year, university)  uni_trends |>   ggplot(aes(x = year, y = n, color = university)) +   geom_line() +   labs(     title = "Econometrics Research Trends at Top Universities",     subtitle = "2000-present",     x = "Year",     y = "Number of Theses",     color = "University"   ) +   facet_wrap(~university, scales = "free_y") +   theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +   theme(legend.position = "none")

title: Analysis Examples
text: Let’s assume higher PhD ratio suggests research-intensive program.
code: # Compute PhD share at each top university top_unis <- uni_counts$university[1:10]  degree_comparison <- econ_theses |>   filter(university %in% top_unis) |>   filter(thesis_type_en %in% c("Master", "Doctorate")) |>   count(university, thesis_type_en) |>   pivot_wider(names_from = thesis_type_en, values_from = n, values_fill = 0) |>   mutate(phd_ratio = Doctorate / (Doctorate + Master)) |>   arrange(desc(phd_ratio))  degree_comparison #> # A tibble: 4 × 4 #>   university            Master Doctorate phd_ratio #>   <chr>                  <int>     <int>     <dbl> #> 1 Ege Universitesi           0         4         1 #> 2 Istanbul Universitesi      0         4         1 #> 3 Ankara Universitesi        4         0         0 #> 4 Marmara Universitesi       4         0         0

title: Analysis Examples
code: # Search for machine learning theses if (live_examples) {   ml_search <- search_basic("makine öğrenmesi",                             max_search_results = Inf)    # Fetch full details (abstracts, keywords, advisor, PDF URLs)   ml_search_sample <- ml_search |>     slice_sample(n = 20)    ml_details <- detail(ml_search_sample$detail_id) } else {   ml_details <- tezr_example_ml_details() }  ml_details #> # A tibble: 5 × 2 #>   thesis_no keywords_tr                                           #>   <chr>     <chr>                                                 #> 1 910001    Makine ogrenmesi; Derin ogrenme; Siniflandirma        #> 2 910002    Makine ogrenmesi; Yapay zeka; Tahmin                  #> 3 910003    Derin ogrenme; Goruntu isleme; Sinir aglari           #> 4 910004    Makine ogrenmesi; Veri madenciligi; Siniflandirma     #> 5 910005    Dogal dil isleme; Makine ogrenmesi; Metin madenciligi

title: Analysis Examples
text: keywords_tr field contains semicolon separated terms. Let’s split , trim whitespace, count.
code: # Parse comma-separated keywords into individual rows keywords <- ml_details |>   filter(!is.na(keywords_tr)) |>   select(thesis_no, keywords_tr) |>   mutate(keywords_tr = str_split(keywords_tr, stringr::fixed(";"))) |>   unnest(keywords_tr) |>   mutate(keyword = str_trim(keywords_tr)) |>   filter(keyword != "")  # Top 5 keywords keyword_freq <- keywords |>   count(keyword, sort = TRUE) |>   head(5)  keyword_freq |>   ggplot(aes(x = n, y = reorder(keyword, n))) +   geom_col() +   labs(     title = "Most Common Keywords in Machine Learning Theses",     x = "Frequency",     y = NULL   ) +   theme_minimal(base_size = 11)

title: Analysis Examples
text: Save search results disk first fetch. Load later sessions skip network calls. RDS preserves column types CSV useful sharing.
code: # Save after first fetch saveRDS(econ_theses, "econ_theses.rds") readr::write_rds(econ_theses, "econ_theses_readr.rds") readr::write_csv(econ_theses, "econ_theses.csv")  # Load in a later session econ_theses <- readRDS("econ_theses.rds")

title: Analysis Examples
text: large result sets, fetch details batches save batch. protects interruptions — process stops, lose current batch.
code: batch_size <- 50 all_results <- search_basic("panel data")  for (i in seq(1, nrow(all_results), by = batch_size)) {   batch_end <- min(i + batch_size - 1, nrow(all_results))   batch <- all_results[i:batch_end, ]    # detail() uses built-in rate limiting   details <- detail(batch$detail_id)    # Save each batch to disk   saveRDS(details, paste0("details_batch_", i, ".rds"))    # Optional short pause between batches   Sys.sleep(2) }

title: Analysis Examples
text: tezr uses built-2-second rate limit request setup. detail() fetches uncached records parallel (5 active requests), large jobs can still take time. Process batches cache results possible.

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: Basic search exceed 2000 results. server-side limit. query returns 2000 records, function warns . cases, can set max_search_results = Inf paginate past limit. search_basic() automatically delegates advanced search pagination set max_search_results = Inf. information pagination .
code: # This stops at 2000 climate_change <- search_basic("climate change")  # Delegate to advanced search with auto-pagination climate_change_all <- search_basic(   keyword = "climate change",   max_search_results = Inf )

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: search_advanced() adds year range, language, group, university/institute, thesis status filters keyword search. NTC advanced search form supports three keyword rows combined Boolean operators (, , ), targeting different field. search_advanced() exposes first keyword row. R packages interface academic databases, rentrez (PubMed) europepmc (Europe PMC), often pass Boolean logic single query string (example, "term1 term2"). NTC accept free-form Boolean strings. uses structured form fields keyword row, pattern applicable . keep interface simple, search_advanced() expose Boolean row combinations. equivalent results, can use following approaches. : Use search_detailed() field-specific parameters (title, author, supervisor, etc.). : Run separate searches combine dplyr::bind_rows() |> dplyr::distinct(). : Run searches exclude dplyr::anti_join().

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
code: # Keyword search with year range recent_climate <- search_advanced(   keyword = "iklim değişikliği",   year_start = 2015,   year_end = 2024 )  # English-language theses only # language accepts ISO 639 codes ("tr", "en", "fr", "de", ...), or # full names ("Turkish", "French") english_growth <- search_advanced(   keyword = "economic growth",   language = "en" )  # French-language theses french_theses <- search_advanced(   keyword = "migration",   language = "fr" )

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: group limits results broad group: "" (default), "science" (Fen Bilimleri), "social" (Sosyal Bilimler), "medical" (Tıp ve Sağlık Bilimleri). status controls whether results include approved theses also -preparation ones: "approved" (default), "", "in_preparation".
code: # Social sciences only social_econ <- search_advanced(   keyword = "ekonometri",   group = "social" )  # In-preparation theses (not yet defended) ongoing_ml <- search_advanced(   keyword = "makine öğrenmesi",   status = "in_preparation" )

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: can combine filters build precise keyword queries. Start minimal query, add constraints.
code: # PhD theses in social sciences, open access, 2000-2024 complex_query <- search_advanced(   keyword = "ekonometri",   search_field = "title",   thesis_type = "phd",   year_start = 2000,   year_end = 2024,   group = "social",   access_type = "open" )

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: max_search_results greater 2000 (including Inf) server reports 2000 matches, tezr switches iterative year-range pagination. supply year_start year_end, package uses 1959:current_year search window. creates year chunks weighted split points (pre-2000, 2000-2010, post-2010) safety target hard 2000-row cap. chunk requested filters original query. chunk still capped server limit, chunk split retried range small enough (single year remains). process, tezr updates split weights observed uncapped chunk densities bias later splits toward denser periods. Finally, chunk results merged, deduplicated thesis_no, returned. single year still exceeds 2000 results, package paginate year warns narrow query additional filters.
code: # Retrieve all results (auto-paginate by year) all_eu <- search_advanced(   keyword = "avrupa",   search_field = "all",   year_start = 2018,   year_end = 2020,   max_search_results = Inf ) dplyr::glimpse(all_eu) #> Rows: 8 #> Columns: 13 #> $ thesis_no         <chr> "967755", "975988", "955779", "974976", "96… #> $ title_original    <chr> "Avrupa Birligi ve Turkiye 1", "Avrupa Birl… #> $ title_translation <chr> "European Union and Turkiye 1", "European U… #> $ author            <chr> "PERIHAN EZGI BALLI", "CENAP ALAYBEYI", "SE… #> $ university        <chr> "Bandirma Onyedi Eylul Universitesi", "Harr… #> $ year              <int> 2025, 2025, 2025, 2024, 2023, 2022, 2021, 2… #> $ thesis_type_tr    <chr> "Doktora", "Yuksek Lisans", "Yuksek Lisans"… #> $ thesis_type_en    <chr> "Doctorate", "Master", "Master", "Master", … #> $ language_tr       <chr> "Turkce", "Turkce", "Turkce", "Turkce", "Tu… #> $ language_en       <chr> "Turkish", "Turkish", "Turkish", "Turkish",… #> $ subject_tr        <chr> "Avrupa Birligi; Ekonomi", "Avrupa Birligi;… #> $ subject_en        <chr> "European Union; Economics", "European Unio… #> $ detail_id         <chr> "TCKf4ksTOVsOBqUcPYMKWQ", "LypZzbdoWcG0f3c6…

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: search_detailed() provides field-specific institutional filters. Use need target thesis titles, authors, supervisors, universities, divisions, disciplines, subjects. supports auto-pagination flow search_advanced(). Available parameters search_detailed() : thesis_no, title, author, supervisor, abstract, keyword, university, university_id, institute, institute_id, division, division_id, subject, discipline, discipline_id, thesis_type, year_start, year_end, language, access_type, group, status, max_search_results, ignore_cache. provide least one search criterion filter use function.

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: can use list_*() functions discover valid filter names server. normal use, can pass names (example university = "Ankara Üniversitesi") functions, tezr handle ID mapping internally. id columns mainly lookup keys used tezr can also pass IDs directly advanced performance-sensitive workflows (example university_id, institute_id, division_id, discipline_id) want.

title: Getting Started with `tezr`

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: YÖK web portal accepts one value per filter field. tezr removes restriction. search_detailed() parameters accept character vectors. pass multiple values, package expands separate API calls, combines results, deduplicates thesis_no. makes cross-institutional cross-disciplinary comparisons possible single function call.
code: # Search across multiple universities multi_uni <- search_detailed(   university = c("Ankara Üniversitesi", "İstanbul Üniversitesi"),   subject = "Ekonomi" )  # Search multiple disciplines within a subject multi_discipline <- search_detailed(   subject = "Ekonomi",   discipline = c("İktisat", "Maliye", "Ekonometri") )  # Multiple thesis types multi_type <- search_detailed(   subject = "Ekonomi",   thesis_type = c("phd", "masters") )  # Multiple languages (ISO 639 codes) multi_lang <- search_detailed(   subject = "Ekonomi",   language = c("tr", "en", "fr") )  # Search across multiple universities with pagination multi_uni_all <- search_detailed(   university = c("Ankara Üniversitesi", "İstanbul Üniversitesi"),   subject = "Ekonomi",   max_search_results = Inf,   ignore_cache = TRUE )

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: tezr caches search results, detail records, year-range queries, lookup lists memory. Caching speeds repeated queries reduces server load.

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: output includes search_count, range_count, detail_count, search_ttl, detail_ttl. Search cache defaults 3600 seconds (1 hour). Detail cache defaults NULL (session lifetime; entries stay clear restart R).

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: can also adjust time--live settings disable caching entirely. TTL values seconds. NULL means entries persist entire session.
code: # 2-hour search cache, 1-week detail cache cache_config(   search_ttl = 7200,   detail_ttl = 604800 )  # Disable caching entirely (every call hits the server) cache_config(enable = FALSE)  # Re-enable with defaults cache_config(enable = TRUE, search_ttl = 3600, detail_ttl = NULL)

title: tezr
text: tezr retrieves, parses, caches, checks thesis metadata Turkiye’s National Thesis Center (NTC, Ulusal Tez Merkezi). NTC Council Higher Education’s national portal graduate thesis records Turkish universities. exposes thesis titles, authors, institutions, degree types, languages, subjects, abstracts, advisors, page counts, access status, detail-page links public web interface. portal contains close one million records, documented public API, bulk export, visible-result cap 2,000 rows per query. tezr turns capped web-archive scriptable R workflow. maps basic, advanced, detailed search forms R functions. resolves valid university, institute, division, discipline, subject labels. retrieves detail pages, parses bilingual metadata tibbles, deduplicates merged searches, caches repeated queries, paginates large searches adaptive year ranges, exposes statistics functions retrieval checks. tezr affiliated , endorsed , connected YÖK, Council Higher Education, National Thesis Center.

title: Get detailed information about a thesis — detail
text: detail_id Character vector. Encoded thesis detail identifier(s) detail_id column search results. Treat values opaque. may contain one portal identifiers depending current National Thesis Center markup. progress Logical. Show text progress updates fetching multiple theses? Default TRUE. ... Reserved internal use.

title: Get detailed information about a thesis — detail
text: tibble thesis details (one row per thesis). Columns (order): thesis_no - Thesis number title_original - Original title title_translation - Title translation available author - Author name advisor - Advisor name title co_advisor - Co-advisor name(s). Multiple names semicolon-separated, absent values NA. university - University name institute - Institute name division - Division name year - Year pages - Number pages thesis_type_tr - Thesis type Turkish, "Doktora" "Yüksek Lisans" thesis_type_en - Thesis type English, "Doctorate" "Master's" language_tr - Language Turkish, "Türkçe" "İngilizce" language_en - Language English (e.g., "Turkish", "English") subject_tr - Turkish subject classifications, semicolon-separated multiple subject_en - English subject classifications, semicolon-separated multiple abstract_original - Abstract thesis's original language available abstract_translation - Translated abstract available keywords_tr - Turkish keywords (includes keywords index field) keywords_en - English keywords (includes keywords index field) access_status - Access status (open/restricted) pdf_url - URL download PDF (available) detail_url - URL thesis detail page

code: search_advanced(   keyword,   search_field = c("title", "all", "author", "supervisor", "subject", "index",     "abstract"),   match_type = c("exact", "contains"),   year_start = NULL,   year_end = NULL,   group = c("all", "science", "social", "medical"),   university = NULL,   university_id = NULL,   thesis_type = c("all", "masters", "phd", "medical_specialty", "arts", "dentistry",     "medical_sub", "pharmacy"),   institute = NULL,   institute_id = NULL,   language = NULL,   access_type = c("all", "open", "restricted"),   status = c("approved", "all", "in_preparation"),   max_search_results = 2000,   ignore_cache = FALSE )

title: Advanced search of the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_advanced
text: keyword Character. single search term. search_field Character. field search . One "title", "author", "supervisor", "subject", "index", "abstract", "". Default "title" (matches web advanced search form). match_type Character. Keyword matching strategy. One "exact" (matches keyword entered) "contains" (substring match). Default "exact". year_start Integer. Start year (optional). year_end Integer. End year (optional). group Character. Group filter. One "", "science" (Fen), "social" (Sosyal), "medical" (Tıp). Default "". university Character. University name (optional). provided without university_id, ID looked automatically. university_id Integer. University ID (optional). Use skip lookup match "Choose" behavior web form. thesis_type Character. Type thesis. One "", "masters", "phd", "medical_specialty", "arts", "dentistry", "medical_sub", "pharmacy". Default "". institute Character. Institute name (optional). provided without institute_id, ID looked automatically. institute_id Integer. Institute ID (optional). Use skip lookup match "Choose" behavior web form. language Integer language ID character label (e.g., "tr", "en", "Turkish", "İngilizce"). access_type Character. Access type. One "", "open", "restricted". Default "". status Character. Thesis status. One "", "approved", "in_preparation". Default "approved". max_search_results Maximum results return. Default 2000 (server limit per query). Use higher values Inf paginate retrieve results via year-range splitting. ignore_cache Logical. TRUE, bypass cached search/range results fetch fresh data server.

title: Advanced search of the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_advanced
text: tibble containing thesis records (structure search_basic).

title: Advanced search of the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_advanced
text: YOK portal's advanced search form supports three keyword rows combined Boolean operators (, , ), targeting different field. function exposes first keyword row. R packages interface academic databases, rentrez (PubMed) europepmc (Europe PMC), pass Boolean logic single query string (e.g., "term1 term2"). YOK portal accept free-form Boolean strings; uses structured form fields keyword row, making pattern inapplicable . equivalent results: across fields: use search_detailed field-specific parameters (title, author, supervisor, etc.). : run separate searches combine dplyr::bind_rows() |> dplyr::distinct(). : run searches exclude dplyr::anti_join().

title: Advanced search of the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_advanced
code: if (FALSE) { # interactive() # Keyword search with year filter climate <- search_advanced(   keyword = "iklim değişikliği",   year_start = 2015 ) dplyr::glimpse(climate) #> Rows: 184 #> Columns: 13 #> $ thesis_no      <chr> "942101", "931450", "918276", ... #> $ title_original <chr> "Iklim degisikligi...", ... #> $ university     <chr> "Ankara Universitesi", ... #> $ year           <int> 2025, 2024, 2024, ... #> $ thesis_type_en <chr> "Master", "Doctorate", "Master", ...  # Search science theses only ml <- search_advanced(   keyword = "makine öğrenmesi",   group = "science",   thesis_type = "phd" )  # Search in-preparation theses ongoing <- search_advanced(   keyword = "ekonometri",   status = "in_preparation" )  # Filter by university/institute (same fields as web advanced form) odtu <- search_advanced(   keyword = "yapay zeka",   university = "Orta Doğu Teknik Üniversitesi",   institute = "Fen Bilimleri Enstitüsü" )  # Get all available results (auto-paginate) all_climate <- search_advanced(   keyword = "iklim değişikliği",   max_search_results = Inf ) }

title: Detailed search of the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_detailed
text: university University name (optional). Accepts character vector multiple universities. university_id University ID (optional). provided, lookup university skipped. thesis_type Type(s) thesis. Default "". Accepts character vector multiple types: "", "masters", "phd", "medical_specialty", "arts", "dentistry", "medical_sub", "pharmacy". Multiple values trigger separate searches combined. year_start Start year (optional). Used pagination results > 2000. year_end End year (optional). Used pagination results > 2000. institute Institute name (optional). Accepts character vector multiple institutes. institute_id Institute ID (optional). provided, lookup institute skipped. access_type Access type. Default "". Accepts character vector multiple access types: "", "open", "restricted". Multiple values trigger separate searches combined. group Group filter. One "", "science", "social", "medical". Default "". thesis_no Thesis number search (optional). Accepts character vector multiple thesis numbers. division Division name (optional). Accepts character vector multiple divisions. division_id Division ID (optional). provided, lookup division skipped. status Character. Thesis status filter. One "approved", "", "in_preparation". Default "approved". title Title search (optional). Accepts character vector multiple titles. discipline Discipline name (optional). Accepts character vector multiple disciplines. discipline_id Discipline ID (optional). provided, lookup discipline skipped. language Integer language ID character label (e.g., "tr", "en", "Turkish", "İngilizce"). Accepts character vector multiple languages. author Author name (optional). Accepts character vector multiple authors. subject Subject (Konu) name (optional). Accepts character vector multiple subjects. supervisor Supervisor name (optional). Accepts character vector multiple supervisors. keyword Keyword text (Dizin) search (optional). Accepts character vector multiple keywords. abstract Abstract text search (optional). Accepts character vector multiple abstracts. max_search_results Maximum results return. Default 2000 (server limit per query). Use higher values Inf get available results via automatic pagination. ignore_cache Logical. TRUE, bypass cached search/range results fetch fresh data server.

title: Detailed search of the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_detailed

title: Detailed search of the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_detailed

Multiple values expanded separate API calls, results combined deduplicated thesis number. total result count exceeds 2000 year range specified, function automatically uses 1959-present year range paginates retrieve results.

title: Detailed search of the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_detailed
code: if (FALSE) { # interactive() # Field-specific search with year filter climate <- search_detailed(   title = "iklim değişikliği",   year_start = 2015,   year_end = 2024 ) head(climate) #> # A tibble: 6 x 13 #>   thesis_no title_original author university year thesis_type_en detail_id #>   <chr>     <chr>          <chr>  <chr>      <int> <chr>          <chr> #> 1 967755    Iklim degis... AYSE   Ankara...  2024 Master         TCKf... #> 2 955779    Iklim polit... MEHMET Istanbul...2023 Doctorate      xSXE...  # Title search with university filter ml_theses <- search_detailed(   title = "makine öğrenmesi",   university = "Orta Doğu Teknik Üniversitesi",   thesis_type = "phd" )  # Search by university and division search_results <- search_detailed(   university = "Ankara Üniversitesi",   division = "İktisat Ana Bilim Dalı",   year_start = 2020,   year_end = 2023 )  # Get ALL results for a subject (auto-paginates if > 2000) all_econ <- search_detailed(subject = "Ekonometri", max_search_results = Inf)  # Search for a specific supervisor's theses search_results <- search_detailed(supervisor = "Hasan Şahin")  # Search across multiple universities (automatically expands) search_results <- search_detailed(   university = c("Ankara Üniversitesi", "İstanbul Üniversitesi"),   subject = "Ekonomi" )  # Search multiple disciplines within a subject search_results <- search_detailed(   subject = "Ekonomi",   discipline = c("İktisat", "Maliye", "Ekonometri") )  # Search for multiple specific thesis numbers search_results <- search_detailed(   thesis_no = c("123456", "234567", "345678") )  # Search for multiple titles search_results <- search_detailed(   title = c("Ekonometri", "Zaman Serileri") )  # Search for multiple languages search_results <- search_detailed(   subject = "Ekonomi",   language = c("tr", "en") )  # Search for multiple thesis types search_results <- search_detailed(   subject = "Ekonomi",   thesis_type = c("phd", "masters") )  # Search for multiple access types search_results <- search_detailed(   subject = "Makine Mühendisliği",   access_type = c("open", "restricted") )  # Complex multi-parameter search search_results <- search_detailed(   author = c("Ahmet Yılmaz", "Mehmet Demir"),   university = c("Ankara Üniversitesi", "İstanbul Üniversitesi"),   year_start = 2020 ) }

title: Retrieve Thesis Metadata from Turkiye's National Thesis Center — tezr-package
text: tezr retrieves, parses, caches, checks thesis metadata Turkiye's National Thesis Center (Ulusal Tez Merkezi), Council Higher Education's public web portal graduate thesis records.

title: Retrieve Thesis Metadata from Turkiye's National Thesis Center — tezr-package
text: Use package academic, reproducible research workflows. Cache save large results locally, avoid repeated identical requests, respect NTC portal's access controls terms. use package bypass access restrictions scrape thesis full text scale.

title: Retrieve Thesis Metadata from Turkiye's National Thesis Center — tezr-package
text: Requests use package-identifying user agent default. Override request_config(user_agent = "...") TEZR_USER_AGENT environment variable needed. Set request_config(verbose = FALSE) TEZR_VERBOSE=false silence informational progress messages. Warnings errors still shown. package applies two-second request delay, retries requests three times, refreshes sessions 50 logical requests 20 minutes, caches searches, range chunks, details, lookups memory. Search detail parsing support legacy WATable response redesigned card-based response observed portal June 2026.

title: Retrieve Thesis Metadata from Turkiye's National Thesis Center — tezr-package
text: Use citation("tezr") preferred package citation. Also cite National Thesis Center Council Higher Education source thesis metadata include retrieval date.

Guarded README vignette live examples behind TEZR_LIVE_EXAMPLES=true. Expanded README, vignette, contribution guidance responsible use, source limitations, citation, maintenance, live-test behavior.
